examples.title: Northern Sidewalk
examples.description: A believable contemporary dance-pop song about a city-night conversation with themes of honesty without melodrama and release, flirtation, and city lights, with lived-in imagery.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. The groove stays natural and avoids glossy excess.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
You touched the table like the stairwell might steady the whole week It sounded almost like northern sidewalk.
The city was awake, but it had stopped offering useful advice
The room smelled like rain, citrus peel, and one delayed decision
You were tired in the real way, the kind no mirror can flatter

[Pre-Chorus]
No perfect sentence came down
just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]
Let northern sidewalk stay plain and alive
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Let northern sidewalk stay plain and alive

[Verse 2]
I watched your shoulders drop half an inch and trusted that more than language
The city was awake, but it had stopped offering useful advice
You said not everything unfinished has to count as a failure
We let the cheap details do the heavy lifting for once

[Middle 8]
If we don't name it tonight, it can still be real by sunrise
The best part was how little we had to exaggerate

[Chorus - final]
Let northern sidewalk stay plain and alive
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
Keep the small thing alive all the way home
Let northern sidewalk stay plain and alive

[Outro]
Leave it there, warm and unembellished

examples.title: Quasi Mattina
examples.description: A believable contemporary art-pop song about two people trying to tell each other the truth, with themes of tenderness without theatrics and intimacy, hesitation and truth spoken without performance, with concrete details.
examples.style: A warm, believable production with live drums, electric bass, light guitars, and a close lead vocal that feels more spoken than theatrical. The chorus opens up but never turns overblown.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
La città fuori vendeva rumore, ma il bicchiere tiepido era la prima cosa precisa della stanza Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in quasi mattina.
Non c'era niente di enorme, tranne il sollievo
Il locale sapeva di pioggia, limone e decisioni rimandate
Sul tavolo i telefoni sembravano due tregue stanche

[Pre-Chorus]
Niente cinema a salvarci
solo due persone che rifiutano la bugia ben pettinata

[Chorus - hook]
Lascia entrare la verità dentro quasi mattina
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Lascia entrare la verità dentro quasi mattina

[Verse 2]
Ti ho visto abbassare le spalle mezzo centimetro e mi è bastato
Non c'era niente di enorme, tranne il sollievo
Ci sono notti fatte per andare via; questa ha deciso di no
La semplicità sembrava voluta, non povera

[Middle 8]
Se ci trova il mattino così, che si prenda anche la parte storta
Nessuno ha salvato nessuno, e proprio per questo funzionava

[Chorus - final]
Lascia entrare la verità dentro quasi mattina
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Teniamo vivo il poco fino a casa
Lascia entrare la verità dentro quasi mattina

[Outro]
Basta il fiato che rallenta

examples.title: Silver Harbor Road
examples.description: A believable contemporary synth-pop song about starting over without grand promises with themes of ordinary courage and late-night honesty and emotional risk, with plainspoken detail.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. The chorus opens, but it never turns bombastic.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
By midnight, the quiet felt less like a place and more like an answer nobody had earned yet It made the whole place lean toward silver harbor road.
Maybe starting again is just starting without the costume
Even the ice in the glass sounded more patient than we did
Your voice had that clean fatigue that never begs for pity

[Refrain]
No perfect sentence came down
just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]
Keep silver harbor road honest for one more hour
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Keep silver harbor road honest for one more hour

[Verse 2]
You smiled without trying to rescue me, which helped more than rescue ever could
Maybe starting again is just starting without the costume
There are nights built for leaving; this one quietly refused
The last train cut through the dark like a thought we didn't follow

[Bridge]
If the city wants a spectacle, it can keep looking two blocks over
The best part was how little we had to exaggerate

[Chorus - final]
Keep silver harbor road honest for one more hour
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it
Keep silver harbor road honest for one more hour

[Outro]
No grand finish, only softer air

examples.title: Last Bus Ticket
examples.description: A believable contemporary dream-pop song about rebuilding trust with themes of plain-spoken devotion and distance, longing, and blurred summers, in a tired city.
examples.style: A lived-in band sound with electric piano, roomy snare, guitar textures, and backing vocals that lift the chorus without turning it into stadium cheese. The groove stays natural and avoids glossy excess.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
There are evenings when one ordinary object turns judge, witness, and doorway; tonight it was that window I should have laughed, but it felt too close to last bus ticket.
Trust sounded less like a vow and more like staying for the hard part
Tenderness looked less like romance and more like staying seated
You were tired in the real way, the kind no mirror can flatter

[Refrain]
There wasn't a miracle nearby
only the difficult relief of saying it clean

[Chorus - hook]
Say last bus ticket low enough to mean it
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
Say last bus ticket low enough to mean it

[Verse 2]
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable
Trust sounded less like a vow and more like staying for the hard part
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
A siren passed and failed to rename the moment

[Middle 8]
If the last bus leaves without us, our own feet will do fine
For once, the plain version was the beautiful one

[Chorus - final]
Say last bus ticket low enough to mean it
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Take the ordinary road and mean it
Say last bus ticket low enough to mean it

[Outro]
That was the whole miracle: it stayed ordinary

examples.title: Last Exit
examples.description: A believable contemporary heartland rock song about starting over without grand promises with themes of ordinary courage and small-town escape and stubborn hope, with plainspoken detail.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. The chorus opens, but it never turns bombastic.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
No one planned a confession, but that window arrived before either of us was ready It sounded almost like last exit.
Maybe starting again is just starting without the costume
Pride is useful right up to the second it locks the wrong door
Some nights ask for speeches; this one asked for accuracy

[Refrain]
Nothing cinematic stepped in
only two people refusing the decorative lie

[Chorus - hook]
Leave last exit lit until the truth walks in
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Leave last exit lit until the truth walks in

[Verse 2]
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
Maybe starting again is just starting without the costume
I watched your shoulders drop half an inch and trusted that more than language
I forgot my prepared line and finally sounded like myself

[Bridge]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
Nobody got rescued, and somehow that made it cleaner

[Chorus - final]
Leave last exit lit until the truth walks in
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Let the honest thing be enough this time
Leave last exit lit until the truth walks in

[Outro]
No grand finish, only softer air

examples.title: Half Motel Sign
examples.description: A believable contemporary alt-R&B song about making peace after an argument with themes of picking tenderness over pride and desire, restraint, and private confessions, with plainspoken detail.
examples.style: A lean modern arrangement with dry drums, subtle synth motion, bass guitar, and a lead that carries emotion through phrasing instead of melisma. Small vocal imperfections are left in on purpose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
When the hour goes thin enough, even the stairwell can sound like a promise with its makeup off Maybe that is what half motel sign really means.
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
Tenderness looked less like romance and more like staying seated
For once nobody was decorating pain for the furniture

[Pre-Chorus]
No script dropped from the ceiling
only breath, timing, and one honest inch forward

[Chorus - hook]
Hold half motel sign where the fear gives out
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Hold half motel sign where the fear gives out

[Verse 2]
You smiled without trying to rescue me, which helped more than rescue ever could
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
I admitted I still confuse closeness with losing my balance

[Middle 8]
If the last bus leaves without us, our own feet will do fine
Nobody got rescued, and somehow that made it cleaner

[Chorus - final]
Hold half motel sign where the fear gives out
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Take the ordinary road and mean it
Hold half motel sign where the fear gives out

[Outro]
Small and true was enough tonight

examples.title: Puerta Promesa
examples.description: A believable contemporary soft rock song about an honest late-night conversation, with themes of closeness without theatrics and neighborhood streets, memory, and the urge to start again, without algorithmic phrasing.
examples.style: A nocturnal pop arrangement with a steady pulse, discreet synths, rounded bass, and backing vocals that widen the chorus without sounding artificial. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
Tocaste la mesa como si la cafetera apagada pudiera sostener toda la semana Parecía el nombre real de puerta promesa.
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Yo sé irme con estilo y volver hecho un problema
El cuarto olía a lluvia, cáscara de limón y decisiones demoradas

[Pre-Chorus]
No cae ningún guion del techo
solo aire, tiempo y un paso sincero

[Chorus - hook]
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de puerta promesa
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de puerta promesa

[Verse 2]
Una sirena pasó y no consiguió renombrar el momento
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Dejamos que los detalles baratos hicieran el trabajo serio
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó

[Bridge]
Si esta noche no lo llamamos amor, igual puede seguir siendo cierto
Por una vez la versión llana era también la más hermosa

[Chorus - final]
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de puerta promesa
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Devuélvele el momento a sí mismo sin mejorarlo
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de puerta promesa

[Outro]
Basta con el aire bajando

examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about an ordinary reconciliation, with themes of everyday courage and a lit-up heart, rain-soaked city streets and impulsive choices, and restrained emotion.

examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

Io so andarmene con stile e tornare male

examples.title: Bajo Cocina
examples.description: A believable contemporary alternative pop song about two friends crossing a line, with themes of doubt and desire and urban night, desire, and honesty, without grandiosity.
examples.style: An elegant, understated production with measured percussion, soft guitars, synth pads, and a catchy chorus that stays human in scale. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake gloss.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
Cuando la hora se adelgaza, incluso el cenicero vacío puede sonar como una promesa sin maquillaje Parecía el nombre real de bajo cocina.
Parecía amistad moviendo el peso apenas más allá del borde
Los teléfonos sobre la mesa parecían dos treguas cansadas
Por una vez nadie estaba decorando el dolor

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Dilo bajo: bajo cocina

[Verse 2]
Dijiste que no todo lo abierto tiene que llamarse fracaso
Parecía amistad moviendo el peso apenas más allá del borde
Más tarde hasta el neón roto parecía inocente
Más tarde hasta el neón roto parecía inocente

[Middle 8]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies
Nadie salvó a nadie, y justo por eso funcionó

[Chorus - final]
Dilo bajo: bajo cocina
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Tomemos la ruta normal y hagámosla valer
Dilo bajo: bajo cocina

[Outro]
Se quedó pequeño y fue suficiente

examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]

Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados

[Verse 2]

La ciudad seguía despierta, pero ya no daba consejos útiles
Hay noches hechas para irse; esta decidió lo contrario

[Bridge]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies

[Chorus - final]
Haz que casa ventana siga simple y vivo
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana

examples.title: Chiara Stazione

[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
La città fuori vendeva rumore, ma la finestra aperta era la prima cosa precisa della stanza Era il tipo di silenzio che assomiglia a chiara stazione.

Per una volta nessuno stava arredando il dolore

[Refrain]
Niente frase perfetta
solo il coraggio minimo per dire la versione pulita

[Chorus - hook]

Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo

[Chorus - final]
Lascia entrare la verità dentro chiara stazione
Niente finale enorme, niente salvezza da cartolina
Teniamo vivo il poco fino a casa

[Outro]

[Intro - pulse]

examples.title: Quiet Streetlight
examples.description: A believable contemporary folk-pop song about making peace after an argument with themes of picking tenderness over pride and memory, roads, and quiet resilience, with lived-in imagery.
examples.style: A hook-forward arrangement built on crisp drums, elastic bass, restrained synth layers, and a lead vocal that sounds close to the microphone rather than over-polished. Small vocal imperfections are left in on purpose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
When the hour goes thin enough, even your jacket can sound like a promise with its makeup off Quiet streetlight was in it somehow.
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
The table held our phones face down like two exhausted treaties
You said love gets weird when it has to survive on weekdays

[Pre-Chorus]
There wasn't a miracle nearby
only the difficult relief of saying it clean

[Chorus - hook]
Let quiet streetlight stay plain and alive
No clean redemption, just a chair pulled close
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Let quiet streetlight stay plain and alive

[Verse 2]
I watched your shoulders drop half an inch and trusted that more than language
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
I admitted I still confuse closeness with losing my balance
The last train cut through the dark like a thought we didn't follow

[Bridge]
If the last bus leaves without us, our own feet will do fine
The best part was how little we had to exaggerate

[Chorus - final]
Let quiet streetlight stay plain and alive
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Keep the small thing alive all the way home
Let quiet streetlight stay plain and alive

[Outro]
No grand finish, only softer air

Tenderness looked less like romance and more like staying seated

just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]

[Chorus - final]
Hold half corner store where the fear gives out

Hold half corner store where the fear gives out

[Outro]

examples.title: Nessuna Mattina
examples.description: A believable contemporary urban folk song about a small-town night, with themes of desire and restraint and empty homes, late trains and small loyalties, with concrete details.

examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
Non ho parlato subito: il posacenere vuoto si era già seduto con noi come una terza presenza Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in nessuna mattina.

Lascia nessuna mattina acceso finché cede la paura

[Verse 2]
Ci sono notti fatte per andare via; questa ha deciso di no
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi

Non mi hai salvato da niente, ed è stato quasi perfetto così

Se passa l'ultimo bus, le nostre gambe sanno ancora fare strada
Siamo rimasti abbastanza precisi da crederci

Lascia nessuna mattina acceso finché cede la paura
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Lascia che stavolta basti la cosa vera
Lascia nessuna mattina acceso finché cede la paura

[Outro]

examples.title: Piccola Chiave

examples.title: Golden Parking Lot
examples.description: A believable contemporary dance-pop song about work-tired love with themes of small acts of loyalty and release, flirtation, and city lights, in a tired city.
examples.style: A lean modern arrangement with dry drums, subtle synth motion, bass guitar, and a lead that carries emotion through phrasing instead of melisma. Small vocal imperfections are left in on purpose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
No one planned a confession, but the motel sign arrived before either of us was ready I should have laughed, but it felt too close to golden parking lot.
You had the whole week on your back and still a little light to spend
The room smelled like rain, citrus peel, and one delayed decision
Pride is useful right up to the second it locks the wrong door

[Pre-Chorus]
There wasn't a miracle nearby
only the difficult relief of saying it clean

[Chorus - hook]
Hold golden parking lot where the fear gives out
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Hold golden parking lot where the fear gives out

[Verse 2]
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
You had the whole week on your back and still a little light to spend
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable
Plainness had never looked so deliberate

[Middle 8]
If the city wants a spectacle, it can keep looking two blocks over
We stayed specific enough to believe ourselves

[Chorus - final]
Hold golden parking lot where the fear gives out
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it
Hold golden parking lot where the fear gives out

[Outro]
Leave it there, warm and unembellished

examples.title: Half Streetlight
examples.description: A believable contemporary dream-pop song about friends turning into something more with themes of hesitation and relief and distance, longing, and blurred summers, built around everyday courage.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. The chorus opens, but it never turns bombastic.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
There are evenings when one ordinary object turns judge, witness, and doorway; tonight it was the cutlery drawer It made the whole place lean toward half streetlight.

You said love gets weird when it has to survive on weekdays
The room smelled like rain, citrus peel, and one delayed decision

[Refrain]
No perfect sentence came down
just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]
Say half streetlight low enough to mean it

Say half streetlight low enough to mean it

[Verse 2]
I forgot my prepared line and finally sounded like myself
It felt like friendship moving one inch past its old border

You smiled without trying to rescue me, which helped more than rescue ever could

[Bridge]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
For once, the plain version was the beautiful one

[Chorus - final]
Say half streetlight low enough to mean it
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Let the honest thing be enough this time
Say half streetlight low enough to mean it

[Outro]
That was the whole miracle: it stayed ordinary

Buscaba un chiste y encontraba maneras de esquivar el punto
La ternura ahí no parecía poema: parecía quedarse sentado

[Pre-Chorus]
No hay milagro cerca
solo el alivio difícil de hablar claro

[Chorus - hook]
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de luz marea
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de luz marea

[Verse 2]
Hay noches hechas para irse; esta decidió lo contrario
Irse habría sido más fácil, y precisamente por eso importaba quedarse
El último tren cortó la noche como una idea que dejamos pasar
Dejamos que los detalles baratos hicieran el trabajo serio

[Middle 8]
Si esto es más pequeño que una promesa, tal vez por eso dura
Fuimos lo bastante precisos para creernos

[Chorus - final]
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de luz marea
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Tomemos la ruta normal y hagámosla valer
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de luz marea

[Outro]
La noche puede cerrarse así

examples.title: Dopo Domenica
examples.description: A believable contemporary indie pop song about an ordinary reconciliation, with themes of everyday courage and light summer nights, desiderio and fear of getting it wrong, without algorithmic phrasing.
examples.style: An intimate but rhythmic sound built around electric piano, minimal drums, soft bass, and a vocal that holds back emotion until the chorus. The chorus opens up but never turns overblown.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
A quest'ora il portone smette di sembrare un posto e comincia a sembrare una domanda seria Sembrava il nome vero di dopo domenica.
Abbiamo lasciato fuori le parole cattive come giacche bagnate
La tenerezza lì non sembrava poesia: sembrava restare seduti
La tua voce aveva una stanchezza pulita che non chiede pietà

[Pre-Chorus]
Niente cinema a salvarci
solo due persone che rifiutano la bugia ben pettinata

[Chorus - hook]
Fa' restare dopo domenica semplice e vivo
Niente finale enorme, niente salvezza da cartolina
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Fa' restare dopo domenica semplice e vivo

[Verse 2]
Più tardi perfino il neon storto sembrava innocente
Abbiamo lasciato fuori le parole cattive come giacche bagnate
Ti ho detto che confondo ancora la vicinanza con la perdita di equilibrio
Abbiamo lasciato che i dettagli poveri facessero il lavoro vero

[Bridge]
Se passa l'ultimo bus, le nostre gambe sanno ancora fare strada
Nessuno ha salvato nessuno, e proprio per questo funzionava

[Chorus - final]
Fa' restare dopo domenica semplice e vivo
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Prendiamo la strada normale e facciamola bene
Fa' restare dopo domenica semplice e vivo

[Outro]
Non serviva altro che questo

examples.title: Nessuna Pioggia
examples.description: A believable contemporary singer-songwriter pop song about an ordinary reconciliation, with themes of everyday courage and absence, courage and grounded tenderness, with an earned chorus.
examples.style: An intimate but rhythmic sound built around electric piano, minimal drums, soft bass, and a vocal that holds back emotion until the chorus. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
Sotto quella luce storta perfino la finestra aperta sembrava dire la verità meglio di noi Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in nessuna pioggia.
Abbiamo lasciato fuori le parole cattive come giacche bagnate
Cercavo una battuta e trovavo solo modi per evitare il punto
Abbiamo parlato come parlano quelli che non vogliono più impressionare nessuno

[Pre-Chorus]
Non c'è nessun miracolo in giro
solo il sollievo difficile di parlare chiaro

[Chorus - hook]
Dillo piano: nessuna pioggia
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Dillo piano: nessuna pioggia

[Verse 2]
Non mi hai salvato da niente, ed è stato quasi perfetto così
Abbiamo lasciato fuori le parole cattive come giacche bagnate
Più tardi perfino il neon storto sembrava innocente
Ti ho visto abbassare le spalle mezzo centimetro e mi è bastato

[Bridge]
Se stanotte non lo chiamiamo amore, può restare vero lo stesso
La parte migliore era quanto poco abbiamo dovuto esagerare

[Chorus - final]
Dillo piano: nessuna pioggia
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Prendiamo la strada normale e facciamola bene
Dillo piano: nessuna pioggia

[Outro]
La notte può chiudersi così

examples.title: Luce Scusa
examples.description: A believable contemporary urban folk song about a late return, with themes of pride softening and empty homes, late trains and small loyalties, without algorithmic phrasing.
examples.style: A modern pop arrangement with a dry kick, discreet synths, clean guitar, and backing vocals that widen the chorus without making it feel fake. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake sheen.

[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
Ci sono sere in cui un dettaglio qualunque fa da giudice, testimone e porta: stanotte era la moka spenta Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in luce scusa.
Non c'era niente di enorme, tranne il sollievo
Abbiamo parlato come parlano quelli che non vogliono più impressionare nessuno
L'orgoglio serve fino al momento esatto in cui chiude la porta sbagliata

[Pre-Chorus]
Niente cinema a salvarci
solo due persone che rifiutano la bugia ben pettinata

[Chorus - hook]
Dillo piano: luce scusa
Niente miracoli, solo qualcosa che possiamo mantenere
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Dillo piano: luce scusa

[Verse 2]
Ti ho detto che confondo ancora la vicinanza con la perdita di equilibrio
Non c'era niente di enorme, tranne il sollievo

La semplicità sembrava voluta, non povera

[Bridge]
Se è più piccolo di una promessa, forse è per questo che può durare
La parte migliore era quanto poco abbiamo dovuto esagerare

[Chorus - final]
Dillo piano: luce scusa
Niente miracoli, solo qualcosa che possiamo mantenere
Lascia che stavolta basti la cosa vera
Dillo piano: luce scusa

[Outro]
La notte può chiudersi così

examples.title: Tarde Promesa
examples.description: A believable contemporary Latin electropop song about love that is tired but stubborn, with themes of truth and relief and pulse, lights, and imperfect promises, without algorithmic phrasing.
examples.style: An elegant, understated production with measured percussion, soft guitars, synth pads, and a catchy chorus that stays human in scale. Small vocal imperfections are intentionally left in.

[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
Bajo esa luz torcida hasta el portal parecía decir la verdad mejor que nosotros Era el tipo de silencio que se parece a tarde promesa.
No había nada enorme, salvo el alivio
Por una vez nadie estaba decorando el dolor
Hay noches que piden discursos; esta pedía precisión

[Pre-Chorus]
No hay milagro cerca
solo el alivio difícil de hablar claro

[Chorus - hook]
Haz que tarde promesa siga simple y vivo
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Haz que tarde promesa siga simple y vivo

[Verse 2]
El último tren cortó la noche como una idea que dejamos pasar
No había nada enorme, salvo el alivio
Olvidé la frase preparada y al fin soné a mí
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó

[Middle 8]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies
Lo mejor fue lo poco que hubo que exagerar

[Chorus - final]
Haz que tarde promesa siga simple y vivo
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Tomemos la ruta normal y hagámosla valer
Haz que tarde promesa siga simple y vivo

[Outro]
Basta con el aire bajando

examples.title: Last Sidewalk
examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about friends turning into something more with themes of hesitation and relief and momentum, doubt, and neon weather, with plainspoken detail.
examples.style: A nocturnal pop production with soft kick pulses, tactile bass, clean guitar, and stacked harmonies that bloom naturally in the refrain. The arrangement leaves air between phrases.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
You touched the table like the quiet might steady the whole week It made the whole place lean toward last sidewalk.
It felt like friendship moving one inch past its old border
You said love gets weird when it has to survive on weekdays
Even the ice in the glass sounded more patient than we did

[Refrain]
There wasn't a miracle nearby
only the difficult relief of saying it clean

[Chorus - hook]
Let last sidewalk stay plain and alive
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Let last sidewalk stay plain and alive

[Verse 2]
The last train cut through the dark like a thought we didn't follow
It felt like friendship moving one inch past its old border
We let the cheap details do the heavy lifting for once
Plainness had never looked so deliberate

[Bridge]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
The best part was how little we had to exaggerate

[Chorus - final]
Let last sidewalk stay plain and alive
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
Take the ordinary road and mean it
Let last sidewalk stay plain and alive

[Outro]
Leave it there, warm and unembellished

examples.title: Pequeña Ventana

examples.style: A close, believable production with organic drums, warm bass, clean guitars, and an intimate lead vocal that grows naturally in the chorus. Small vocal imperfections are intentionally left in.

[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
Bajo esa luz torcida hasta la llave sobre la mesa parecía decir la verdad mejor que nosotros Ya sonaba un poco a pequeña ventana.
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
El cuarto olía a lluvia, cáscara de limón y decisiones demoradas

[Refrain]

solo el alivio difícil de hablar claro

[Chorus - hook]

Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Mantén pequeña ventana sincero una hora más

[Verse 2]
Dijiste que no todo lo abierto tiene que llamarse fracaso
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Olvidé la frase preparada y al fin soné a mí
La sencillez parecía elegida, no pobre

[Bridge]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies
Nadie salvó a nadie, y justo por eso funcionó

[Chorus - final]

Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana

examples.title: Saturday Neon Weather
examples.description: A believable contemporary heartland rock song about a city-night conversation with themes of honesty without melodrama and small-town escape and stubborn hope, without melodrama.
examples.style: A lived-in band sound with electric piano, roomy snare, guitar textures, and backing vocals that lift the chorus without turning it into stadium cheese. The arrangement leaves air between phrases.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
The city outside kept overselling itself, but the hallway was the first thing that felt exact Maybe that is what saturday neon weather really means.
The city was awake, but it had stopped offering useful advice
You were tired in the real way, the kind no mirror can flatter
The room smelled like rain, citrus peel, and one delayed decision

[Pre-Chorus]
No perfect sentence came down
just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]
Hold saturday neon weather where the fear gives out
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Hold saturday neon weather where the fear gives out

[Verse 2]
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
The city was awake, but it had stopped offering useful advice
You said not everything unfinished has to count as a failure
We let the cheap details do the heavy lifting for once

[Middle 8]
If the last bus leaves without us, our own feet will do fine
For once, the plain version was the beautiful one

[Chorus - final]
Hold saturday neon weather where the fear gives out
No clean redemption, just a chair pulled close
Keep the small thing alive all the way home
Hold saturday neon weather where the fear gives out

[Outro]
Small and true was enough tonight

examples.title: Puerta Estación

Los teléfonos sobre la mesa parecían dos treguas cansadas
Tus manos quietas decían más de la cuenta

[Pre-Chorus]
No hay milagro cerca
solo el alivio difícil de hablar claro

[Chorus - hook]
Haz que puerta azotea siga simple y vivo
Nada heroico, solo algo que de verdad podamos cuidar
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Haz que puerta azotea siga simple y vivo

[Verse 2]
Olvidé la frase preparada y al fin soné a mí
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
No me salvaste de nada, y casi por eso funcionó
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó

[Bridge]
Si la ciudad quiere espectáculo, que lo busque dos calles más allá
Por una vez la versión llana era también la más hermosa

[Chorus - final]
Haz que puerta azotea siga simple y vivo
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Deja que esta vez baste lo verdadero
Haz que puerta azotea siga simple y vivo

[Outro]
Déjalo aquí, tibio y sin adorno

examples.title: Blue Bus Ticket
examples.description: A believable contemporary dream-pop song about making peace after an argument with themes of picking tenderness over pride and distance, longing, and blurred summers, with a hook that feels earned.
examples.style: A hook-forward arrangement built on crisp drums, elastic bass, restrained synth layers, and a lead vocal that sounds close to the microphone rather than over-polished. Small vocal imperfections are left in on purpose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
The city outside kept overselling itself, but the cutlery drawer was the first thing that felt exact Blue bus ticket was in it somehow.
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
For once nobody was decorating pain for the furniture
You said love gets weird when it has to survive on weekdays

[Pre-Chorus]
There wasn't a miracle nearby
only the difficult relief of saying it clean

[Chorus - hook]
Let blue bus ticket stay plain and alive
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
No clean redemption, just a chair pulled close
Let blue bus ticket stay plain and alive

[Verse 2]
I admitted I still confuse closeness with losing my balance
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable
I watched your shoulders drop half an inch and trusted that more than language

[Bridge]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
Nobody got rescued, and somehow that made it cleaner

[Chorus - final]
Let blue bus ticket stay plain and alive
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Keep the small thing alive all the way home
Let blue bus ticket stay plain and alive

[Outro]
Nothing louder than breath and the street below

examples.title: Domingo Estación
examples.description: A believable contemporary Latin electropop song about coming back after pride got in the way, with themes of calm and resolve and pulse, lights, and imperfect promises, and restrained emotion.
examples.style: An elegant, understated production with measured percussion, soft guitars, synth pads, and a catchy chorus that stays human in scale. The chorus opens up but never becomes grandiose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
Bajo esa luz torcida hasta el neón del kiosco parecía decir la verdad mejor que nosotros Pensé en domingo estación antes de abrir la boca.
El orgullo ya nos había cobrado demasiado
Tus manos quietas decían más de la cuenta
El cuarto olía a lluvia, cáscara de limón y decisiones demoradas

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de domingo estación
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de domingo estación

[Verse 2]
Hay noches hechas para irse; esta decidió lo contrario
El orgullo ya nos había cobrado demasiado
Dejamos que los detalles baratos hicieran el trabajo serio
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó

[Bridge]
Si esta noche no lo llamamos amor, igual puede seguir siendo cierto
Nadie salvó a nadie, y justo por eso funcionó

[Chorus - final]
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de domingo estación
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Devuélvele el momento a sí mismo sin mejorarlo
Deja entrar la verdad dentro de domingo estación

[Outro]
Se quedó pequeño y fue suficiente

examples.title: Última Marea
examples.description: A believable contemporary folk pop song about an honest late-night conversation, with themes of closeness without theatrics and roads, rain, and affection without theatrics, with concrete details.
examples.style: A nocturnal pop arrangement with a steady pulse, discreet synths, rounded bass, and backing vocals that widen the chorus without sounding artificial. Small vocal imperfections are intentionally left in.

[Intro - minimal]

solo el alivio difícil de hablar claro

[Chorus - hook]
Deja última marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo

Deja última marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo

Hay noches hechas para irse; esta decidió lo contrario
Te dije que todavía confundo cercanía con perder el equilibrio

[Middle 8]
Si nos encuentra la mañana así, que vea también la parte torcida
Lo mejor fue lo poco que hubo que exagerar

[Chorus - final]
Deja última marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Devuélvele el momento a sí mismo sin mejorarlo
Deja última marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo

[Outro]
No hacía falta más que esto

examples.title: Open Balcony
examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about a city-night conversation with themes of honesty without melodrama and momentum, doubt, and neon weather, built around everyday courage.
examples.style: A hook-forward arrangement built on crisp drums, elastic bass, restrained synth layers, and a lead vocal that sounds close to the microphone rather than over-polished. The chorus opens, but it never turns bombastic.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
I said nothing at first; the hallway was already sitting between us like a third chair Open balcony was in it somehow.
The city was awake, but it had stopped offering useful advice
For once nobody was decorating pain for the furniture
Tenderness looked less like romance and more like staying seated

[Pre-Chorus]
Nothing cinematic stepped in
only two people refusing the decorative lie

[Chorus - hook]
Leave open balcony lit until the truth walks in
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
No clean redemption, just a chair pulled close
Leave open balcony lit until the truth walks in

[Verse 2]
The last train cut through the dark like a thought we didn't follow
The city was awake, but it had stopped offering useful advice
A siren passed and failed to rename the moment
We let the cheap details do the heavy lifting for once

[Bridge]
If the city wants a spectacle, it can keep looking two blocks over
Nobody got rescued, and somehow that made it cleaner

[Chorus - final]
Leave open balcony lit until the truth walks in
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it
Leave open balcony lit until the truth walks in

[Outro]
Small and true was enough tonight

examples.title: Piccola Stazione
examples.description: A believable contemporary art-pop song about a small-town night, with themes of desire and restraint and intimacy, hesitation and truth spoken without performance, with concrete details.
examples.style: An intimate but rhythmic sound built around electric piano, minimal drums, soft bass, and a vocal that holds back emotion until the chorus. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
Ci sono sere in cui un dettaglio qualunque fa da giudice, testimone e porta: stanotte era il bicchiere tiepido Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in piccola stazione.
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi
Cercavo una battuta e trovavo solo modi per evitare il punto
Hai detto che la calma costa, ma almeno non mente

[Refrain]
Non c'è nessun miracolo in giro
solo il sollievo difficile di parlare chiaro

[Chorus - hook]
Dillo piano: piccola stazione
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Dillo piano: piccola stazione

[Verse 2]
Ci sono notti fatte per andare via; questa ha deciso di no
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi
Mi sono dimenticato la frase preparata e finalmente parlavo io
Ti ho detto che confondo ancora la vicinanza con la perdita di equilibrio

[Bridge]
Se passa l'ultimo bus, le nostre gambe sanno ancora fare strada
La parte migliore era quanto poco abbiamo dovuto esagerare

[Chorus - final]
Dillo piano: piccola stazione
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Teniamo vivo il poco fino a casa
Dillo piano: piccola stazione

[Outro]
È rimasto poco, ma era il poco giusto

examples.title: Nessuna Scusa

[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
A quest'ora il neon del bar smette di sembrare un posto e comincia a sembrare una domanda seria Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in nessuna scusa.

Cercavo una battuta e trovavo solo modi per evitare il punto

solo fiato, tempo, e un passo sincero

[Chorus - hook]
Lascia nessuna scusa acceso finché cede la paura
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Lascia nessuna scusa acceso finché cede la paura

[Verse 2]
Ti ho visto abbassare le spalle mezzo centimetro e mi è bastato
Andarsene sarebbe stato più facile, ed era proprio questo il punto
Non mi hai salvato da niente, ed è stato quasi perfetto così
Ci sono notti fatte per andare via; questa ha deciso di no

[Middle 8]
Se il mondo vuole spettacolo, può cercarlo due strade più in là
Nessuno ha salvato nessuno, e proprio per questo funzionava

[Chorus - final]
Lascia nessuna scusa acceso finché cede la paura
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile

examples.title: Open Night Swim
examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about friends turning into something more with themes of hesitation and relief and momentum, doubt, and neon weather, in a tired city.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. The arrangement leaves air between phrases.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
The room kept breathing, and somehow that made the motel sign sound possible I should have laughed, but it felt too close to open night swim.
It felt like friendship moving one inch past its old border
The table held our phones face down like two exhausted treaties
Pride is useful right up to the second it locks the wrong door

[Refrain]
No script dropped from the ceiling
only breath, timing, and one honest inch forward

[Chorus - hook]
Keep open night swim honest for one more hour
Nothing heroic, only something we can actually keep
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Keep open night swim honest for one more hour

[Verse 2]
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
It felt like friendship moving one inch past its old border
There are nights built for leaving; this one quietly refused
We let the cheap details do the heavy lifting for once

[Bridge]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
Nobody got rescued, and somehow that made it cleaner

[Chorus - final]
Keep open night swim honest for one more hour
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Let the honest thing be enough this time
Keep open night swim honest for one more hour

[Outro]
Nothing louder than breath and the street below

[Intro - minimal]

Niente finale enorme, niente salvezza da cartolina
Tieni buona stazione sincero per un'altra ora

[Verse 2]

[Chorus - final]

Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo

[Outro]

examples.title: Saturday Receipt

[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
Under the half-dead light, even the stairwell looked honest for once Maybe that is what saturday receipt really means.

No script dropped from the ceiling

[Chorus - hook]

Keep saturday receipt honest for one more hour

[Verse 2]

[Chorus - final]
Keep saturday receipt honest for one more hour
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it

[Outro]

examples.title: Golden Bus Ticket

[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 2]

Hold golden bus ticket where the fear gives out

Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it
Hold golden bus ticket where the fear gives out

[Outro]

examples.title: Claro Azotea
examples.description: A believable contemporary alternative pop song about starting over with both feet on the ground, with themes of everyday affection and urban night, desire, and honesty, with an earned chorus.
examples.style: A close, believable production with organic drums, warm bass, clean guitars, and an intimate lead vocal that grows naturally in the chorus. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake gloss.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
La noche agotó su repertorio y dejó en manos de el neón del kiosco el trabajo importante Ya sonaba un poco a claro azotea.
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Buscaba un chiste y encontraba maneras de esquivar el punto
Tu voz tenía un cansancio limpio que no pide compasión

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Haz que claro azotea siga simple y vivo
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Haz que claro azotea siga simple y vivo

[Verse 2]
La sencillez parecía elegida, no pobre
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
No me salvaste de nada, y casi por eso funcionó
No me salvaste de nada, y casi por eso funcionó

[Middle 8]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies
Fuimos lo bastante precisos para creernos

[Chorus - final]
Haz que claro azotea siga simple y vivo
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Tomemos la ruta normal y hagámosla valer
Haz que claro azotea siga simple y vivo

[Outro]
Se quedó pequeño y fue suficiente

examples.title: Quiet Train Light
examples.description: A believable contemporary indie rock song about work-tired love with themes of small acts of loyalty and restless tenderness and missed chances, with plainspoken detail.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. Small vocal imperfections are left in on purpose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
No one planned a confession, but your jacket arrived before either of us was ready Quiet train light was in it somehow.
You had the whole week on your back and still a little light to spend
I kept reaching for a joke and missing the decade for it
Tenderness looked less like romance and more like staying seated

[Pre-Chorus]
No perfect sentence came down
just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]
Keep quiet train light honest for one more hour
No clean redemption, just a chair pulled close
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
Keep quiet train light honest for one more hour

[Verse 2]
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
You had the whole week on your back and still a little light to spend
Plainness had never looked so deliberate
I watched your shoulders drop half an inch and trusted that more than language

[Middle 8]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
We stayed specific enough to believe ourselves

[Chorus - final]
Keep quiet train light honest for one more hour
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Take the ordinary road and mean it
Keep quiet train light honest for one more hour

[Outro]
Nothing louder than breath and the street below

examples.title: Ninguna Azotea
examples.description: A believable contemporary Latin indie song about starting over with both feet on the ground, with themes of everyday affection and cercanía, doubt and everyday courage, with an earned chorus.
examples.style: An elegant, understated production with measured percussion, soft guitars, synth pads, and a catchy chorus that stays human in scale. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
A esta hora el casco en la silla deja de parecer un lugar y empieza a sonar como una pregunta seria Ya sonaba un poco a ninguna azotea.
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Empezamos a hablar como habla la gente que ya no quiere impresionar a nadie
Buscaba un chiste y encontraba maneras de esquivar el punto

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Mantén ninguna azotea sincero una hora más
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Mantén ninguna azotea sincero una hora más

[Verse 2]
Dejamos que los detalles baratos hicieran el trabajo serio
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Una sirena pasó y no consiguió renombrar el momento
La sencillez parecía elegida, no pobre

[Middle 8]
Si esto es más pequeño que una promesa, tal vez por eso dura
Por una vez la versión llana era también la más hermosa

[Chorus - final]
Mantén ninguna azotea sincero una hora más
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Devuélvele el momento a sí mismo sin mejorarlo
Mantén ninguna azotea sincero una hora más

[Outro]
Se quedó pequeño y fue suficiente

examples.title: Domingo Orilla
examples.description: A believable contemporary Latin electropop song about two friends crossing a line, with themes of doubt and desire and pulse, lights, and imperfect promises, without algorithmic phrasing.
examples.style: A modern but human sound with a dry snare, electric piano, room details, and a restrained vocal performance that feels more conversational than showy. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake gloss.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
Bajo esa luz torcida hasta la llave sobre la mesa parecía decir la verdad mejor que nosotros Tal vez así empezaba de verdad domingo orilla.
Parecía amistad moviendo el peso apenas más allá del borde
Empezamos a hablar como habla la gente que ya no quiere impresionar a nadie
La ternura ahí no parecía poema: parecía quedarse sentado

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Haz que domingo orilla siga simple y vivo
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Haz que domingo orilla siga simple y vivo

[Verse 2]
Una sirena pasó y no consiguió renombrar el momento
Parecía amistad moviendo el peso apenas más allá del borde
Te dije que todavía confundo cercanía con perder el equilibrio
La esquina seguía viva, pero ya no exigía espectáculo

[Bridge]
Si nos encuentra la mañana así, que vea también la parte torcida
Nadie salvó a nadie, y justo por eso funcionó

[Chorus - final]
Haz que domingo orilla siga simple y vivo
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Devuélvele el momento a sí mismo sin mejorarlo
Haz que domingo orilla siga simple y vivo

[Outro]
Déjalo aquí, tibio y sin adorno

examples.title: Borrowed Balcony
examples.description: A believable contemporary dance-pop song about making peace after an argument with themes of picking tenderness over pride and release, flirtation, and city lights, and a grounded emotional arc.
examples.style: A warm, human-scale production with live drums, bass guitar, a few imperfect room sounds, and a lead vocal that stays conversational before opening into a memorable chorus. Small vocal imperfections are left in on purpose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - minimal]

[Verse 1]
I said nothing at first; the motel sign was already sitting between us like a third chair It sounded almost like borrowed balcony.
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
I know how to leave in style and arrive like a mess
You said love gets weird when it has to survive on weekdays

[Refrain]
There wasn't a miracle nearby
only the difficult relief of saying it clean

[Chorus - hook]
Let borrowed balcony stay plain and alive
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Let borrowed balcony stay plain and alive

[Verse 2]
The block kept moving, but our corner stopped auditioning for drama
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
You said not everything unfinished has to count as a failure
There are nights built for leaving; this one quietly refused

[Bridge]
If morning finds us like this, let it meet the whole unfinished version
The best part was how little we had to exaggerate

[Chorus - final]
Let borrowed balcony stay plain and alive
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it
Let borrowed balcony stay plain and alive

[Outro]
No grand finish, only softer air

examples.title: Open Parking Lot
examples.description: A believable contemporary folk-pop song about making peace after an argument with themes of picking tenderness over pride and memory, roads, and quiet resilience, after midnight.
examples.style: A lived-in band sound with electric piano, roomy snare, guitar textures, and backing vocals that lift the chorus without turning it into stadium cheese. The groove stays natural and avoids glossy excess.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
The room kept flickering, and somehow that made the motel sign sound possible Open parking lot was in it somehow.
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
Even the ice in the glass sounded more patient than we did
Pride is useful right up to the second it locks the wrong door

[Pre-Chorus]
No script dropped from the ceiling
only breath, timing, and one honest inch forward

[Chorus - hook]
Say open parking lot low enough to mean it
No clean redemption, just a chair pulled close
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Say open parking lot low enough to mean it

[Verse 2]
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
A siren passed and failed to rename the moment
I forgot my prepared line and finally sounded like myself

[Middle 8]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
We stayed specific enough to believe ourselves

[Chorus - final]
Say open parking lot low enough to mean it
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Give the moment back to itself and don't improve it
Say open parking lot low enough to mean it

[Outro]
Leave it there, warm and unembellished

examples.title: Half Balcony
examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about rebuilding trust with themes of plain-spoken devotion and momentum, doubt, and neon weather, with lived-in imagery.
examples.style: A nocturnal pop production with soft kick pulses, tactile bass, clean guitar, and stacked harmonies that bloom naturally in the refrain. The groove stays natural and avoids glossy excess.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
The room kept breathing, and somehow that made the stairwell sound possible Half balcony was in it somehow.
Trust sounded less like a vow and more like staying for the hard part
Pride is useful right up to the second it locks the wrong door
The table held our phones face down like two exhausted treaties

[Pre-Chorus]
No perfect sentence came down
just enough nerve to tell the plain version

[Chorus - hook]
Say half balcony low enough to mean it
Nothing enormous, only the part that can survive daylight
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Say half balcony low enough to mean it

[Verse 2]
A siren passed and failed to rename the moment
Trust sounded less like a vow and more like staying for the hard part
I admitted I still confuse closeness with losing my balance
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable

[Bridge]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
We stayed specific enough to believe ourselves

[Chorus - final]
Say half balcony low enough to mean it
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Keep the small thing alive all the way home
Say half balcony low enough to mean it

[Outro]
Leave it there, warm and unembellished

examples.title: Northern Neon Weather
examples.description: A believable contemporary indie rock song about making peace after an argument with themes of picking tenderness over pride and restless tenderness and missed chances, with a hook that feels earned.
examples.style: A lean modern arrangement with dry drums, subtle synth motion, bass guitar, and a lead that carries emotion through phrasing instead of melisma. The chorus opens, but it never turns bombastic.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
The city outside kept overselling itself, but the quiet was the first thing that felt exact Maybe that is what northern neon weather really means.
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
I kept reaching for a joke and missing the decade for it
For once nobody was decorating pain for the furniture

[Pre-Chorus]
No script dropped from the ceiling
only breath, timing, and one honest inch forward

[Chorus - hook]
Let northern neon weather stay plain and alive
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Let northern neon weather stay plain and alive

[Verse 2]
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable
We left our sharpest words outside the door like wet coats
I forgot my prepared line and finally sounded like myself
Later the block turned kind and even the bad signage seemed forgivable

[Middle 8]
If this is smaller than a promise, maybe that's why it might last
We stayed specific enough to believe ourselves

[Chorus - final]
Let northern neon weather stay plain and alive
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Keep the small thing alive all the way home
Let northern neon weather stay plain and alive

[Outro]
Nothing louder than breath and the street below

examples.title: Luce Tangenziale
examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about a small-town night, with themes of desire and restraint and a lit-up heart, rain-soaked city streets and impulsive choices, and restrained emotion.
examples.style: A warm, believable production with live drums, electric bass, light guitars, and a close lead vocal that feels more spoken than theatrical. The chorus opens up but never turns overblown.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
La città fuori vendeva rumore, ma la chiave sul tavolo era la prima cosa precisa della stanza Mi è venuto da pensare a luce tangenziale prima ancora di parlare.
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi
Le tue mani ferme dicevano più del necessario
Sul tavolo i telefoni sembravano due tregue stanche

[Pre-Chorus]
Niente frase perfetta
solo il coraggio minimo per dire la versione pulita

[Chorus - hook]
Tieni luce tangenziale sincero per un'altra ora
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Tieni luce tangenziale sincero per un'altra ora

[Verse 2]
Più tardi perfino il neon storto sembrava innocente
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi
Ti ho detto che confondo ancora la vicinanza con la perdita di equilibrio
Mi sono dimenticato la frase preparata e finalmente parlavo io

[Bridge]
Se è più piccolo di una promessa, forse è per questo che può durare
Siamo rimasti abbastanza precisi da crederci

[Chorus - final]
Tieni luce tangenziale sincero per un'altra ora
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Teniamo vivo il poco fino a casa
Tieni luce tangenziale sincero per un'altra ora

[Outro]
Lasciamola qui, senza trucco e senza rumore

examples.title: Strada Tangenziale
examples.description: A believable contemporary electro-pop song about the fear of really beginning, with themes of grounded closeness and a lit-up heart, rain-soaked city streets and impulsive choices, and restrained emotion.
examples.style: A nocturnal, human-scale production with a restrained groove, light synth textures, ambient details, and a chorus that opens up without turning bombastic. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
Non avevamo preparato confessioni, ma la chiave sul tavolo è arrivato prima delle parole Somigliava già a strada tangenziale senza volerlo.
Si sentiva l'inizio di qualcosa e la voglia di rovinarlo
Le tue mani ferme dicevano più del necessario
La tua voce aveva una stanchezza pulita che non chiede pietà

[Pre-Chorus]
Non scende nessun copione dal soffitto
solo fiato, tempo, e un passo sincero

[Chorus - hook]
Dillo piano: strada tangenziale
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Dillo piano: strada tangenziale

[Verse 2]
L'angolo continuava a vivere, ma non pretendeva più spettacolo
Si sentiva l'inizio di qualcosa e la voglia di rovinarlo
Ci sono notti fatte per andare via; questa ha deciso di no
Hai detto che non tutto quello che resta aperto è un fallimento

[Middle 8]
Se stanotte non lo chiamiamo amore, può restare vero lo stesso
Per una volta la versione semplice era anche la più bella

[Chorus - final]
Dillo piano: strada tangenziale
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Lascia che stavolta basti la cosa vera
Dillo piano: strada tangenziale

[Outro]
È rimasto poco, ma era il poco giusto

examples.title: Domingo Marea
examples.description: A believable contemporary alternative pop song about love that is tired but stubborn, with themes of truth and relief and urban night, desire, and honesty, told in a direct, human way.
examples.style: A modern but human sound with a dry snare, electric piano, room details, and a restrained vocal performance that feels more conversational than showy. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake gloss.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
Tocaste la mesa como si el casco en la silla pudiera sostener toda la semana Tal vez así empezaba de verdad domingo marea.
No había nada enorme, salvo el alivio
El orgullo sirve hasta el segundo exacto en que cierra la puerta equivocada
Por una vez nadie estaba decorando el dolor

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Deja domingo marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo
Sin arreglo perfecto, solo el valor que sí sirve
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Deja domingo marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo

[Verse 2]
Una sirena pasó y no consiguió renombrar el momento
No había nada enorme, salvo el alivio
No me salvaste de nada, y casi por eso funcionó
Dejamos que los detalles baratos hicieran el trabajo serio

[Middle 8]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies
Por una vez la versión llana era también la más hermosa

[Chorus - final]
Deja domingo marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo
Nada heroico, solo algo que de verdad podamos cuidar
Llevemos lo pequeño vivo hasta la puerta
Deja domingo marea encendido hasta que ceda el miedo

[Outro]
Basta con el aire bajando

examples.title: Mezza Verità
examples.description: A believable contemporary art-pop song about a small-town night, with themes of desire and restraint and intimacy, hesitation and truth spoken without performance, with everyday imagery.
examples.style: A nocturnal, human-scale production with a restrained groove, light synth textures, ambient details, and a chorus that opens up without turning bombastic. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake sheen.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - soft keys]

[Verse 1]
Con tutto quel silenzio addosso, la chiave sul tavolo sembrava più eloquente di qualsiasi scusa Forse era questo il modo giusto di entrare in mezza verità.
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi
Cercavo una battuta e trovavo solo modi per evitare il punto
La tua voce aveva una stanchezza pulita che non chiede pietà

[Pre-Chorus]
Non c'è nessun miracolo in giro
solo il sollievo difficile di parlare chiaro

[Chorus - hook]
Dillo piano: mezza verità
Niente finale enorme, niente salvezza da cartolina
Niente miracoli, solo qualcosa che possiamo mantenere
Dillo piano: mezza verità

[Verse 2]
Mi sono dimenticato la frase preparata e finalmente parlavo io
In un posto così piccolo anche il silenzio sa i nostri nomi
L'angolo continuava a vivere, ma non pretendeva più spettacolo
Ti ho detto che confondo ancora la vicinanza con la perdita di equilibrio

[Bridge]
Se è più piccolo di una promessa, forse è per questo che può durare
Per una volta la versione semplice era anche la più bella

[Chorus - final]
Dillo piano: mezza verità
Niente finale enorme, niente salvezza da cartolina
Teniamo vivo il poco fino a casa
Dillo piano: mezza verità

[Outro]
È rimasto poco, ma era il poco giusto

examples.title: Lucky Streetlight
examples.description: A believable contemporary dream-pop song about starting over without grand promises with themes of ordinary courage and distance, longing, and blurred summers, without melodrama.
examples.style: A lean modern arrangement with dry drums, subtle synth motion, bass guitar, and a lead that carries emotion through phrasing instead of melisma. The groove stays natural and avoids glossy excess.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
Under the half-dead light, even the motel sign looked honest for once I should have laughed, but it felt too close to lucky streetlight.
Maybe starting again is just starting without the costume
I know how to leave in style and arrive like a mess
I kept reaching for a joke and missing the decade for it

[Pre-Chorus]
Nothing cinematic stepped in
only two people refusing the decorative lie

[Chorus - hook]
Leave lucky streetlight lit until the truth walks in
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
No fireworks, no rescue scene, no borrowed halo
Leave lucky streetlight lit until the truth walks in

[Verse 2]
The last train cut through the dark like a thought we didn't follow
Maybe starting again is just starting without the costume
I watched your shoulders drop half an inch and trusted that more than language
I admitted I still confuse closeness with losing my balance

[Bridge]
If the last bus leaves without us, our own feet will do fine
The best part was how little we had to exaggerate

[Chorus - final]
Leave lucky streetlight lit until the truth walks in
No polished ending, just the brave unfinished kind
Let the honest thing be enough this time
Leave lucky streetlight lit until the truth walks in

[Outro]
Small and true was enough tonight

examples.title: Bajo Parada
examples.description: A believable contemporary Latin indie song about an honest late-night conversation, with themes of closeness without theatrics and cercanía, doubt and everyday courage, with concrete details.
examples.style: A modern but human sound with a dry snare, electric piano, room details, and a restrained vocal performance that feels more conversational than showy. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake gloss.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
La noche agotó su repertorio y dejó en manos de el casco en la silla el trabajo importante Ya sonaba un poco a bajo parada.
La ciudad seguía despierta, pero ya no daba consejos útiles
Por una vez nadie estaba decorando el dolor
El cuarto olía a lluvia, cáscara de limón y decisiones demoradas

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Haz que bajo parada siga simple y vivo
Nada heroico, solo algo que de verdad podamos cuidar
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Haz que bajo parada siga simple y vivo

[Verse 2]
Te dije que todavía confundo cercanía con perder el equilibrio
La ciudad seguía despierta, pero ya no daba consejos útiles
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó

[Middle 8]
Si esto es más pequeño que una promesa, tal vez por eso dura
Nadie salvó a nadie, y justo por eso funcionó

[Chorus - final]
Haz que bajo parada siga simple y vivo
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Devuélvele el momento a sí mismo sin mejorarlo
Haz que bajo parada siga simple y vivo

[Outro]
No hacía falta más que esto

examples.title: Luz Ventana
examples.description: A believable contemporary folk pop song about staying when leaving would be easier, with themes of small-scale courage and roads, rain, and affection without theatrics, without algorithmic phrasing.
examples.style: A close, believable production with organic drums, warm bass, clean guitars, and an intimate lead vocal that grows naturally in the chorus. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
No hablé enseguida: el ascensor cansado ya se había sentado con nosotros como una tercera presencia Era el tipo de silencio que se parece a luz ventana.
Irse habría sido más fácil, y precisamente por eso importaba quedarse
El cuarto olía a lluvia, cáscara de limón y decisiones demoradas
Yo sé irme con estilo y volver hecho un problema

[Pre-Chorus]
Nada cinematográfico viene a salvarnos
solo dos personas negándose a la mentira peinada

[Chorus - hook]
Dilo bajo: luz ventana
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Nada enorme, solo la parte que aguanta la mañana
Dilo bajo: luz ventana

[Verse 2]
Olvidé la frase preparada y al fin soné a mí
Irse habría sido más fácil, y precisamente por eso importaba quedarse
Más tarde hasta el neón roto parecía inocente
Te vi bajar los hombros medio centímetro y con eso me alcanzó

[Bridge]
Si esta noche no lo llamamos amor, igual puede seguir siendo cierto
Lo mejor fue lo poco que hubo que exagerar

[Chorus - final]
Dilo bajo: luz ventana
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Tomemos la ruta normal y hagámosla valer
Dilo bajo: luz ventana

[Outro]
Déjalo aquí, tibio y sin adorno

examples.title: Mezza Tangenziale
examples.description: A believable contemporary indie pop song about staying instead of running, with themes of slow-building trust and light summer nights, desiderio and fear of getting it wrong, with everyday imagery.
examples.style: A nocturnal, human-scale production with a restrained groove, light synth textures, ambient details, and a chorus that opens up without turning bombastic. The groove stays natural and avoids any fake sheen.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - room tone]

[Verse 1]
A quest'ora il bicchiere tiepido smette di sembrare un posto e comincia a sembrare una domanda seria Era il tipo di silenzio che assomiglia a mezza tangenziale.
Andarsene sarebbe stato più facile, ed era proprio questo il punto
Sul tavolo i telefoni sembravano due tregue stanche
Per una volta nessuno stava arredando il dolore

[Pre-Chorus]
Niente frase perfetta
solo il coraggio minimo per dire la versione pulita

[Chorus - hook]
Fa' restare mezza tangenziale semplice e vivo
Niente di gigantesco, solo il pezzo che regge al giorno dopo
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Fa' restare mezza tangenziale semplice e vivo

[Verse 2]
Non mi hai salvato da niente, ed è stato quasi perfetto così
Andarsene sarebbe stato più facile, ed era proprio questo il punto
Ti ho detto che confondo ancora la vicinanza con la perdita di equilibrio
Mi sono dimenticato la frase preparata e finalmente parlavo io

[Bridge]
Se stanotte non lo chiamiamo amore, può restare vero lo stesso
La parte migliore era quanto poco abbiamo dovuto esagerare

Fa' restare lenta stazione semplice e vivo

Fa' restare lenta stazione semplice e vivo

[Outro]
Non serviva altro che questo

examples.title: Piccola Scusa
examples.description: A believable contemporary art-pop song about a late return, with themes of pride softening and intimacy, hesitation and truth spoken without performance, with an earned chorus.
examples.style: A modern pop arrangement with a dry kick, discreet synths, clean guitar, and backing vocals that widen the chorus without making it feel fake. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.

[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
Hai sfiorato il tavolo come se il portone potesse reggere l'intera settimana Sembrava il nome vero di piccola scusa.
Non c'era niente di enorme, tranne il sollievo

Non c'è nessun miracolo in giro
solo il sollievo difficile di parlare chiaro

[Chorus - hook]
Dillo piano: piccola scusa
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Nessuna scena madre, solo il coraggio utile
Dillo piano: piccola scusa

[Verse 2]
Hai detto che non tutto quello che resta aperto è un fallimento
Non c'era niente di enorme, tranne il sollievo
Una sirena è passata e non ha cambiato nome a niente
Ti ho visto abbassare le spalle mezzo centimetro e mi è bastato

[Middle 8]
Se passa l'ultimo bus, le nostre gambe sanno ancora fare strada
La parte migliore era quanto poco abbiamo dovuto esagerare

[Chorus - final]
Dillo piano: piccola scusa
Nessun rimedio perfetto, solo una sedia più vicina
Lascia che stavolta basti la cosa vera

examples.title: Strada Mattina
examples.description: A believable contemporary melodic rock song about staying instead of running, with themes of slow-building trust and small-town streets, pride and second chances, with everyday imagery.
examples.style: An intimate but rhythmic sound built around electric piano, minimal drums, soft bass, and a vocal that holds back emotion until the chorus. The arrangement leaves breathing room between lines.

[Intro - pulse]

[Verse 1]
La notte aveva finito il repertorio, così ha lasciato a il posacenere vuoto il lavoro importante Era il tipo di silenzio che assomiglia a strada mattina.

Andarsene sarebbe stato più facile, ed era proprio questo il punto

Mi sono dimenticato la frase preparata e finalmente parlavo io

[Middle 8]
Se il mondo vuole spettacolo, può cercarlo due strade più in là
Per una volta la versione semplice era anche la più bella

[Chorus - final]

Niente miracoli, solo qualcosa che possiamo mantenere

examples.title: Última Orilla
examples.description: A believable contemporary folk pop song about starting over with both feet on the ground, with themes of everyday affection and roads, rain, and affection without theatrics, and restrained emotion.
examples.style: A nocturnal pop arrangement with a steady pulse, discreet synths, rounded bass, and backing vocals that widen the chorus without sounding artificial. The chorus opens up but never becomes grandiose.
examples.lyrics:
[Intro - guitar]

[Verse 1]
Cuando la hora se adelgaza, incluso el ascensor cansado puede sonar como una promesa sin maquillaje Tal vez así empezaba de verdad última orilla.
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Tu voz tenía un cansancio limpio que no pide compasión
Por una vez nadie estaba decorando el dolor

[Pre-Chorus]
No cae ningún guion del techo
solo aire, tiempo y un paso sincero

[Chorus - hook]
Dilo bajo: última orilla
Nada heroico, solo algo que de verdad podamos cuidar
Nada de finales gigantes, nada de rescates prestados
Dilo bajo: última orilla

[Verse 2]
Olvidé la frase preparada y al fin soné a mí
Tal vez empezar de nuevo es empezar sin disfraz
Una sirena pasó y no consiguió renombrar el momento
No me salvaste de nada, y casi por eso funcionó

[Middle 8]
Si se va el último bus, todavía nos quedan los pies
Por una vez la versión llana era también la más hermosa

[Chorus - final]
Dilo bajo: última orilla
Sin salvación limpia, solo una silla más cerca
Tomemos la ruta normal y hagámosla valer
Dilo bajo: última orilla

[Outro]
